Tools :

Animista :

a css animation library with a collection of ready made animations .

CSS-gride-generator :

the name explains itself

CSS gradients:

A tool to make it easy to control and set gradients.

Design.dev :

A punch of dev tools for CSS. Maybe this all what you need. https://design.dev/

Flowbite Svelte :

components library for Svelte https://flowbite-svelte.com/
